title: Use of English – 2025 Admisión Titular A

questions.prompt: I've never driven such an uncomfortable car before.
answers: This is the least comfortable car I've ever driven.
This is the least comfortable car I have ever driven.

questions.prompt: He will go with you provided that you don't drive fast.
answers: Unless you drive slowly, he will not go with you.
Unless you drive slowly, he won't go with you.
Unless you drive more slowly, he will not go with you.
Unless you drive more slowly, he won't go with you.

questions.prompt: Although she is a good lawyer, she doesn't always win her cases.
answers: Despite her being a good lawyer, she doesn't always win her cases.
Despite her being a good lawyer, she does not always win her cases.
Despite being a good lawyer, she doesn't always win her cases.
Despite being a good lawyer, she does not always win her cases.
Despite the fact that she is a good lawyer, she doesn't always win her cases.
Despite the fact that she is a good lawyer, she does not always win her cases.
Despite the fact that she's a good lawyer, she doesn't always win her cases.
Despite the fact that she's a good lawyer, she does not always win her cases.
Despite not always winning her cases, she is a good lawyer.
Despite not always winning her cases, she's a good lawyer.

questions.prompt: Claudia may know the right answer.
answers: It is likely that Claudia knows the right answer.
It's likely that Claudia knows the right answer.
Claudia is likely to know the right answer.
Claudia's likely to know the right answer.
I would rather you didn't touch my laptop.
I'd rather you didn't touch my laptop.
I would rather you did not touch my laptop.
I'd rather you did not touch my laptop.

questions.prompt: Someone will take you to the train station in a fancy car.
answers: You will be taken to the train station in a fancy car.
You'll be taken to the train station in a fancy car.

questions.prompt: It was a cold evening, so we decided to stay indoors.
answers: It was such a cold evening that we decided to stay indoors

questions.prompt: What time is the next bus to York?
answers: I would like to know what time the next bus to York is.
I'd like to know what time the next bus to York is.
I would like to know what time the next bus to York leaves.
I'd like to know what time the next bus to York leaves.
I would like to know when the next bus to York is.
I'd like to know when the next bus to York is.
I would like to know when the next bus to York leaves.
I'd like to know when the next bus to York leaves.

questions.prompt: I gave her a watch, but it stopped working two days later.
answers: I gave her a watch which stopped working two days later.
The watch which I gave her stopped working two days later.

questions.prompt: ‘Don't leave the door unlocked,' his mother told Peter.
answers: His mother warned Peter not to leave the door unlocked.
Peter's mother warned him not to leave the door unlocked.
Peter was warned not to leave the door unlocked by his mother.
Peter was warned by his mother not to leave the door unlocked.

questions.prompt: We'll get to the theatre after the beginning of the play.
answers: By the time we get to the theatre, the play will have begun.
By the time we get to the theatre, the play will have already begun.
By the time we get to the theatre, the play'll have begun.
By the time we get to the theatre, the play'll have already begun.

questions.prompt: My sister ate a lot of sweets when she was a child.
answers: My sister used to eat a lot of sweets when she was a child.
When she was a child, my sister used to eat a lot of sweets.
As a child, my sister used to eat a lot of sweets.
When my sister was a child, she used to eat a lot of sweets.
